data.scene: User shares text, URLs, or content from any Android app to Home Assistant via the system share sheet.
data.purpose: Send shared content (text, URLs, subject) to the Home Assistant server as a mobile_app.share event for automation or logging.
data.source: External Android app (via ACTION_SEND intent); caller app identity extracted via ActivityCompat.getReferrer
data.item: Shared text, shared URL, subject line, caller app identity (referrer URI)
data.frequency: On-demand (each time the user shares content to Home Assistant)
data.processing: Extracted from incoming intent and immediately transmitted to Home Assistant server via REST API; no local processing or transformation
data.storage: Not stored locally on device; data is forwarded to the Home Assistant server in transit
data.recipient: Home Assistant server (via REST API mobile_app.share event)
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; data is sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server only
data.switchpath: Share sheet -> Select Home Assistant app -> Content is sent to server
